events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the wrong compressor oil is a lubricant/refrigerant-chemistry mismatch (e.g., PAG vs. POE/mineral) that violates OEM spec and EPA 609 practice, risking accelerated compressor wear and seal damage. Marked `fail`, `high` risk, with recovery/flush/recharge corrective actions and a compressor inspection before return to service.
